title: This Is How To Cook Steak Perfectly Every Time
transcript: welcome to the series where I show you how to cook the perfect paned steak and all of my favorite sauces to go with it let's do it starting out we're going to need a room temperature steak what I have here is eye fillet weighs roughly 300 G we're going to season this up well with salt and pepper on both sides just patting it down to make sure that's all stuck to the surface once you have that done we can then place a pan over a high heat we're going to add in one teaspoon of vegetable oil or grape seed oil or any oil of your choice really add in that steak sear it for about 2 and 1/2 minutes just until you have that beautiful Golden Crust flip it over add in the rosemary garlic and butter allow that butter to melt and then we're just going to base the steak for roughly 2 minutes so about 4 and 1/2 minutes cooking time in total then we can remove this from the pan allow it to rest you can add on all of the garlic and rosemary as well and I do recommend pouring over some of those pan juices to get a little bit more flavor in there we're going to let this rest for 5 minutes once that has done and all the juices have redistributed slice this up serve it however you want but there we have our perfect medium rare steak

title: Gordon Ramsay's ULTIMATE COOKERY COURSE: How to Cook the Perfect Steak

title: Cooking basics for Newbies Part 10
transcript: cooking basics for new bees part 10 let me show you how to cut an onion in three different ways fine dice sliced and large dice first step is to make sure you have a sharp knife for any type of cut you need to start with chopping off the non-root end cut it in half down the root and peel it for finely diced onions make several vertical cuts across the onion as close to the root as possible make two to three horizontal Cuts depending on how small or big the onion is grip the onion with a claw shape and start slicing downwards to get this fine dice once you reach closer to the end lay it flat and keep cutting for the sides just make more vertical slices and cut for sliced onions cut the root off and make sure to cut lengthwise across the onion to get almost equal size shapes of sliced onions for large dice or cubed onions cut the root off cut vertical lines with wider spaces between each cut and do the same the other way to get this result send this to a friend cuz they need to learn

title: How To Cook Using a Dishwasher

Place down a sheet of tin foil. Carefully place down the salmon. Coat in butter, salt, black pepper, garlic, lemon, and a sprig of rosemary. Wrap the salmon in the tin foil. Be sure to wrap it securely on all sides. Now place it into your empty dishwasher. Set your dishwasher on its hottest cycle. Simply close the dishwasher and press start. title: This Common Mistake Can Ruin Your Monitor
transcript: are you sure you've been cleaning your monitor the right way first of all alcohol and screens don't really mix higher concentrations can actually damage the coating of your monitor instead you want to use distilled water like this guy unlike tap water it's free minerals and other particulants that can harm your screen you should also use a microfiber cloth because it's safe for your screen while still being effective at cleaning it step one turn off your monitor dampen the cloth with a little bit of that distilled water and then make sure any excess is removed be gentle and use a circular motion to get rid of smudges and any debris be sure to use a clean section of the cloth for each pass so that you don't spread that smudge and dirt around once you've done a first pass with the wet cloth it's time for one more wipe with a dry cloth now your monitor should be good to go next time you need to clean it just follow these easy steps

title: Why you NEED to install RAM like this!
transcript: this might be one of the most common mistakes a newbie PC Builder can make you don't just Ram your RAM into any slot if you have two sticks you need to make sure that they get slotted in the paired slots usually one slot apart this is so your RAM can communicate simultaneously in dual Channel mode utilizing its full power but what if you end up running them in the same channel well it's like you're only using one stick of ram which tends to perform poorly what if you take it up a notch and use two different RAM sticks together turns out you'll be okay but you're going to be running at the lowest common denominator wasting the performance of the better stick so you're not going to be blowing up your PC by putting the ram in the wrong slots or even mixing different kinds of ram but you are going to be wasting your money and leaving performance on the table

title: How to Upgrade Your Graphics Card
transcript: upgrading your GPU first make sure your PC is unplugged and off open up your case and there's your GPU unplug it undo the thumb screws that hold the GPU bracket onto the case now press down on the clip which secures your GPU to the pcie slot it may be hard to reach so if it is just use what you've got now gently wiggle your GPU out and now it's time to install the new GPU line up your card with the top pcie slot then gently push it into place screw down the GPU bracket to the case in this case we need a bit more power than the previous cards make sure you're using the appropriate adapters and cables close your case up plug your display port in to your GPU and now get ready to game

title: Are you maximizing your RAM speed?
transcript: this is the easiest tweak you can do to boost the performance of your system and it's free our kit here is rated to go as high as 6400 Mega transfers per second but right now it's running out of measly 4 800. that means we're not getting the most performance possible out of our Ram let's fix that power on your PC smash that BIOS button it's usually an F key like F2 could even be delete if you're not sure check your motherboard manual or do a Google once you're in the setup menu you're looking for the XMP setting for Intel motherboards or docp for AMD motherboards these are preset overclocking profiles that allow your RAM to run at its highest rated speed enable it remember to save your settings as you leave the BIOS and you're good to go now when you boot your PC you'll know your RAM is running as fast as its tiny little legs can carry it

wanted one of his sons to be president, and he'd let nothing get in the way. As a result,

would cure her mood swings, but afterwards, she had the intellectual level of a toddler 
and spent the rest of her life hidden away in a care facility, dying in 2005. It was only after

title: $16B Tiffany & Co. Origin Story
transcript: Tiffany and Co started in 1837 when Charles Lewis Tiffany opened a small stationery store in New York City. Over the decades the brand transformed into a luxury jewelry empire. The iconic Tiffany Blue color was chosen in 1845 and became a symbol of elegance and exclusivity. Today Tiffany is worth over 16 billion dollars and is owned by LVMH. The design philosophy emphasizes timeless beauty and craftsmanship that has defined American luxury for nearly two centuries.

title: How Tiffany & Co was Created?!
transcript: The meaning behind Tiffany design goes back to founder Charles Tiffany who believed jewelry should be an art form. Each piece carries symbolism from nature and architecture. The Tiffany Setting introduced in 1886 revolutionized diamond engagement rings by lifting the stone above the band to maximize its brilliance. This design choice had deep meaning representing the idea that love should be elevated and celebrated. The architectural details of the Fifth Avenue flagship store reflect these same principles of beauty and permanence.

title: Tiffany & Co Is Lying To You
transcript: Let me tell you what Tiffany does not want you to know about their jewelry pricing. The markup on Tiffany diamonds is significantly higher than independent jewelers. The Tiffany brand name adds roughly 50 to 100 percent to the cost of comparable quality pieces. However the design quality and craftsmanship are genuinely excellent. The question is whether the heritage and meaning behind the Tiffany name justifies the premium price. Many jewelry experts say the iconic blue box itself carries significant symbolic value in our culture.
